mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reports (reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason_code, reason_detail) VALUES (#{reporterId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reasonCode}, #{reasonDetail})
mapper.select: SELECT id, reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason_code, reason_detail, status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at FROM reports WHERE id = #{id}
